requirement_topic.en: Energy Labelling and Certificate — RETIQ for household refrigerators
requirement_topic.zh: 能效标签与注册——RETIQ家用电冰箱
requirement_topic.zht: 能效標籤與註冊——RETIQ 家用電冰箱

summary.en: Retiq requires model-level placement controls in which refrigerators must carry a mandatory energy label and supporting registration data before market entry. Importer-facing filing in Colombia aligns the model's electrical class and annual consumption attributes with the local regime, which is administratively supervised by onshore entities.
summary.zh: RETIQ要求电冰箱进行型号级市场准入控制，进入市场前应有强制能效标签，并提交支撑登记数据。哥伦比亚要求由国内管理方配合进口商完成型号文件与年度能耗等信息的备案。
summary.zht: RETIQ 要求電冰箱進行型號級市場准入控制，進入市場前須有強制能效標籤，並提交支撐登記資料。哥倫比亞要求由國內管理方配合進口商完成型號文件與年度能耗等資訊的備案。

standards_or_laws: RETIQ (energy-efficiency information framework for refrigeration appliances)
Colombian technical registration and labeling workflow for imported household appliances

summary.en: In China, energy labelling for household refrigerators is mandatory under GB 12021.2 and the China Energy Label framework, with minimum efficiency grades administered domestically and model documentation in CN-specified formats.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱能效要求基于GB 12021.2和中国能效标识制度，按国内强制体系执行，标识等级与数据口径为中国体系内定义。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱能效要求基於 GB 12021.2 和中國能效標籤制度，按國內強制體系執行，標籤等級與數據口徑依中國體系定義。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.2 — Minimum allowable values and energy-efficiency grades for household refrigerators
China Energy Label (CEL) administration notices under NDRC/SAMR

gap.en: This is a re-labelling and data-alignment gap. Chinese Grade levels are not directly mappable to Colombian format, and model data must be submitted in the RETIQ-required structure with importer-held filing. The gap is not a technical prohibitions gap but a compliance-documentation and registration formality.
gap.zh: 这是重在标签与数据对齐的差距。中国1~5级体系不能直接映射到哥伦比亚要求，需按RETIQ规定格式提交模型资料并由进口商完成备案。不是技术禁止性差距，而是合规文件和登记形式差距。
gap.zht: 這是重在標籤與數據對齊的差距。中國1~5級體系不能直接映射到哥倫比亞要求，需按 RETIQ 規定格式提交型號資料並由進口商完成備案。不是技術性禁止差距，而是合規文件和登記形式差距。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — RETIQ energy label and associated filing are mandatory before placement in Colombia
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 12021.2 energy class compliance and China Energy Label display are mandatory before domestic sale

source.publisher: Ministerio de Minas y Energia / RETIQ references

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Colombian RETIQ energy label and model filing path is required for market placement. China Energy Label compliance does not substitute because the labels, data structure, and filing channels differ. Reuse data where possible, then generate Colombia-compliant filing artifacts.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 哥伦比亚需要 RETIQ 能效标签及型号备案路径才能进行市场投放。中国能效标识要求不能直接替代，因为标签样式、数据结构和备案渠道不同。应复用可共用数据后输出符合哥伦比亚要求的文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 哥倫比亞需要 RETIQ 能效標籤及型號備案路徑才能進行市場投放。中國能效標識要求不能直接取代，因標籤樣式、數據結構與備案管道不同。應先復用可共用數據，再輸出符合哥倫比亞要求的文件。

requirement_topic.en: Test method and energy-performance basis vs China under RETIQ context
requirement_topic.zh: 测试方法与能效基准差异（RETIQ背景）
requirement_topic.zht: 測試方法與能效基準差異（RETIQ 背景）

summary.en: Colombia applies its own test and reporting logic for household refrigerator energy-performance assessment before sale. Because Colombia and China differ in electrical frequency and nominal design baseline (Colombia 110/220 V, 60 Hz), test context and declared consumption comparability should be reassessed for each model and not assumed from GB 12021.2 test sets.
summary.zh: 哥伦比亚在销售前依据自身测试和报告逻辑评估冰箱能效表现。由于哥伦比亚电网为110/220 V、60 Hz，与中国220/380 V、50 Hz不同，不能直接沿用GB 12021.2测试集合来确定哥伦比亚能效等级，需按模型重新确认测试情景与耗电量申报口径。
summary.zht: 哥倫比亞在銷售前依據自身測試與報告邏輯評估冰箱能效表現。由於哥倫比亞電網為110/220 V、60 Hz，與中國220/380 V、50 Hz不同，不能直接沿用 GB 12021.2 測試集合來確定哥倫比亞能效等級，需按型號重新確認測試情境與耗電量申報口徑。

standards_or_laws: Colombian test-report and product-registration data requirements for imported appliances

summary.en: China uses GB/T 8059 and GB 12021.2 to define test methods and energy classes for household refrigerators in the domestic market context. Both China and Colombia trace electrical safety/equipment logic toward IEC sources, but performance class architecture and declaration templates are not interchangeable.
summary.zh: 中国在国内采用 GB/T 8059 与 GB 12021.2 进行家用电冰箱测试方法和能效分级。两国均有 IEC 渊源，但性能等级结构与申报模板不可互换。
summary.zht: 中國在國內採用 GB/T 8059 與 GB 12021.2 進行家用電冰箱測試方法和能效分級。兩國均有 IEC 源頭，但性能等級結構與申報模板不可互換。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 8059 — Test methods for household and similar refrigerating appliances

gap.en: The gap is in energy-measurement comparability. A Chinese Grade 1 or Grade 2 result does not determine Colombian compliance status. Exporters must either retest under the Colombian-recognized methodology or confirm an accepted direct mapping for each model class. Voltage/frequency mismatch increases the need for method and declaration checks for compressors and cabinet controls.
gap.zh: 差距在于能效测量口径的可比性。中国1级或2级结论不能直接决定哥伦比亚合规等级。出口商必须按哥伦比亚认可的方法重新测试，或为每个型号确认可接受的映射关系。电压/频率差异也要求对压缩机和控制系统测试上下文进行核对。
gap.zht: 差距在於能效測量口徑之可比性。中國1級或2級結果不能直接決定哥倫比亞合規等級。出口商必須按哥倫比亞承認的方法重新測試，或為每個型號確認可接受的映射。電壓/頻率差異也要求對壓縮機和控制系統測試情境進行核對。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for market filing and placement, as consumption figures and energy class must match RETIQ declarations
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 12021.2 and domestic test regime are mandatory for China

source.publisher: Ministerio de Minas y Energia energy-efficiency governance references

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Colombia requires model data that is expressed in the local energy-label structure; Chinese GB 12021.2 grades are a good technical baseline but not a legal substitute. Retest or official recalculation mapping is required where frequency and declared class definitions differ.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 哥伦比亚要求以本地能效标签结构表达型号数据，中国GB 12021.2等级可作为技术参考，但不能直接替代。鉴于频率与等级定义差异，需进行复测或官方认可映射。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 哥倫比亞要求以本地能效標籤結構表達型號數據，中國 GB 12021.2 等級可作為技術參考，但不能直接取代。鑑於頻率與等級定義差異，需進行複測或官方認可映射。
